sentiment.summary: Markets stabilizing as Trump signals Iran conflict nearing an end — WTI crude crashed 7% off highs and VIX eased to 28.58, but geopolitical uncertainty persists.

insights.text: Iran War Fear Easing — But Stay Alert. Trump signaling swift Iran resolution sent equities recovering while WTI crude collapsed 7% to $88. VIX eased to 28.58 but stays elevated. Feb CPI drops Wednesday — next major macro catalyst to watch.

BTC Surging Today but Still Below Your $73,135 Basis. Up +4.17% to $70,809 as Iran risk eases and risk-on appetite returns. Still 3.2% underwater on your position. Iran resolution and CPI could push BTC back above $75K — watch headlines closely.

Rocket Lab Firing on All Cylinders. 83rd mission March 6, record $180M Q4 revenue, $1.85B backlog up 73% YoY, 100% launch success rate in 2025. You're +12% above your ~$62 avg cost. Neutron targeting Q4 2026 — next major catalyst.

EchoStar: Debt-Free but Still Below Your $114.33 Basis. $42.65B spectrum sale to AT&T/SpaceX eliminated bankruptcy risk. Falcon 9 EchoStar XXV launch is the near-term catalyst. Down ~4% from basis — watch for launch date announcement.

T1 Energy Breaks 200-Day Moving Average — Bullish Signal. TE closed $7.18, crossing its 200-day MA at $4.91 on volume. You're +6.7% above your ~$6.73 avg basis on 464 shares. Technical breakout could accelerate as energy transition narrative builds.

Seagate Crushed Earnings but Still 19% Below Your $448.98 Basis. Q2 EPS $3.11 beat by 11.5%, revenue $2.83B up 22% YoY, FCF $607M. Still ~$85 underwater vs. your avg. HAMR AI storage platform is the long-term thesis — hold.

Telesat Drifting — Down 7.5% from Your $33.33 Basis. Trading ~$31 with no major near-term catalyst. LEO constellation capex is massive with delayed revenue. Earnings March 26, EPS est. -$1.05. Geopolitical volatility continues to punish speculative satellite names.

BigBear.ai Down 53% from Your $9.02 Basis — High Pain. Q4 revenue fell 37.5% YoY. Bright side: $462M cash, 90% debt reduction. DOGE cuts and defense spending uncertainty are real headwinds. Analyst 12-month target $7.79 — speculative upside only.

Nebius Bleeding 30% Below Your $131.12 Basis. Missouri AI campus approved, Microsoft and Meta contracts secured. Strong Buy consensus, $151.71 avg analyst target. Trading ~$90 — patience required. AI infrastructure story remains fully intact.

Oklo Has Halved from Your $125 Basis — Earnings March 17. Down 50% to ~$62. Nuclear SMR story solid: data center demand, zero-carbon power thesis. March 17 earnings is the immediate catalyst. High conviction play — this needs time and nerves of steel.

Navitas Below Basis — GaN Product Cycle Just Starting. Q4 revenue $7.3M, mobile under 25% as high-power markets lead. Down ~18% from your $10 basis. New 10kW all-GaN platform debuts at APEC March 22-26 — watch for design-win announcements as catalyst.
